'''''Last Hope''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] which served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] attempted to break through the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] on [[Edan II/Legends|Edan II]], but was crippled, crashing onto the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface with the loss of all hands. The wreckage of the ship slid precariously close to the edge of a plateau, perched directly above a ravine. The ship was discovered by a small group of Rebels, who salvaged what was left of the corvette's supplies. The [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Teles Jalahafi]] later ambushed the Rebels inside the ship, and the ensuing battle sent the wrecked hull into the ravine, killing Jalahafi.
